entry.title: New: BILL031(25) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE TRANSIT CONSTRUCTION MITIGATION FUND.

Changes eligibility for the Transit Construction Mitigation Fund by increasing the maximum allowed annual revenue to $1,000,000; removing the number of employees limit; and by requiring the business to have opened at least 12 months prior to the start of any Rail Project construction within the transit construction mitigation zone in which the business is physically located, as determined by the BFS Director.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
